Slot: FINGER
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Coldain Hunting Blanket
No Trade Quest Item
Slot: FINGER
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 23:00:46
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Quests | Comments ]

Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Coldain Hunting Blanket (Tailoring, 125 trivial)
    • Class: ALL
    Expansion: Scars of Velious
    Yield: 1 x Coldain Hunting Blanket

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Eastern Wastes
Quest Name
Coldain Ring #1: Copper Coldain Insignia Ring


Uploaded November 26th, 2020 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Trivial 67 or under
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2006 at 4:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1632701890322
16 posts
Combined today, skill of 64 and +5% gnome mod item which kicked me to 67. Combine worked and got the ".. no longer advance etc" so must be 67 if you didnt get msg at 66.
▲ Page top
No Drop or No trade or BOTH?????
QuoteReply

flazor

96 posts
I am asking to see if i can have a better tailorer do it for me . Can any one answer that for me ?

RE: No Drop or No trade or BOTH?????
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2006 at 10:33 PM Rating: Decent
Sequince
View User Forum
Scholar
662 posts
The final result (after it's made) is No drop. So no you would have to make it on your own.

▲ Page top
Trival 77 or lower
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2004 at 9:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794034479
8 posts
I just made one of these with a skill of 77. I got the "You cant advance" message so the trivial is 77 or below :D
▲ Page top
Trivial???
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2003 at 4:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786743103
5 posts
Anybody know the trivial for this?? i know it says 41 but i've just tried twice, one with 44 and once with 66, both failed, grrr. didn't get the message: you can no longer etc.
▲ Page top
RE: Trivial???
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2003 at 5:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786743103
5 posts
ok answering myself :) i have after first 2 tries made the blanket twice succesfully at 66 skill, this is NOT trivial at that point tho' as it doesn't say you can no longer advance.... etc. saw someone say 81 for trivial somewhere, havne't checked it tho'

▲ Page top
RE: Bueller? Anyone?
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2003 at 8:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779499873
Scholar
79 posts
Might want to retry check using correct spelling, military instead of 'miltary'.

If unsure of correct spelling my suggestion is use abbreviated search (ie. coldain mil) it has saved me much time and aggravation as I am not the most knowledgeable speller myself.

Best wishes & Good luck on the wrist :)
▲ Page top
why is this not linked?
